expectations.text: Output file is named exemple-prompt-A-1-2.md (same base name as the source image, .md extension, not .txt)
Output uses Markdown headings/lists for the visible title and bullet structure rather than a flat text dump
expectations.evidence: Output uses '#'/'##' headings, '-' nested bullets, and '**bold**' emphasis matching the image's visual hierarchy (e.g. '## Contexte & mission', '## 2) Règles d'or (non négociables)')

expectations.text: Output contains only verbatim transcribed text, with no 'Résumé'/'Summary' section (none was requested)
Transcription accurately reflects the French text and placeholders in the image without paraphrasing, translating, or summarizing it
expectations.evidence: Placeholders ({SUJET_OU_DOMAINE}, {OBJECTIF_UTILISATEUR}, etc.) and wording preserved verbatim

eval_feedback.overall: All 4 assertions pass. Clean Markdown transcription, correct filename/extension.
